2606.30209.title: A Multi Center Breast FNAC Whole-Slide Cytology Dataset for AI-Assisted Patch-Wise Classification Using C1 to C5 Reporting Categories
2606.30209.paper_summary: We present a multi center breast fine needle aspiration cytology (FNAC) dataset designed for patch wise classification using C1 to C5 reporting labels. The prospective dataset includes 321 patients and 470 whole-slide images (WSIs) collected from participating tertiary medical centers in India between May 2023 and March 2026. Slides were stained using Papanicolaou (190 WSIs) or MayGrunwald Giemsa (280 WSIs), scanned on a Hamamatsu NanoZoomer S360 at 40X magnification and 0.25 microns per pixel, and stored directly in NDPI format. Across the 470 WSIs, 446 WSIs contain annotated patch regions, yielding 7,398 PNG image patches with expert-verified C1 to C5 labels. The release includes NDPI WSIs, WSI-level GeoJSON annotation files, extracted patch images, deidentified metadata, a data dictionary, a validation summary, a manifest linking WSIs to Zenodo records, and code for dataset inspection and reuse. The complete dataset is approximately 950 GB and is available through Zenodo.
2606.30209.paper_summary_zh: 我們呈現一個多中心乳腺細針抽吸細胞學（FNAC）數據集，旨在使用 C1 到 C5 報告標籤進行區域分類。該前瞻性數據集包括 321 名患者和 470 張從印度參與的三級醫療中心收集的全幻燈片圖像（WSIs），收集時間為 2023 年 5 月至 2026 年 3 月。幻燈片使用帕帕尼科勞（190 WSIs）或梅伊-格倫瓦爾德-吉姆薩（280 WSIs）染色，並在 40X 放大倍率和每像素 0.25 微米的條件下，使用 Hamamatsu NanoZoomer S360 掃描，並直接以 NDPI 格式存儲。在這 470 張 WSI 中，446 張 WSI 包含標註的區域，產生 7,398 張經專家驗證的 C1 到 C5 標籤的 PNG 圖像區塊。此次發布包括 NDPI WSI、WSI 級 GeoJSON 標註文件、提取的區塊圖像、去識別化的元數據、數據字典、驗證摘要、一份將 WSI 與 Zenodo 記錄鏈接的清單，以及用於數據集檢查和重用的代碼。完整的數據集約為 950 GB，並可通過 Zenodo 獲取。
